final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: fine-art gallery piece
Asset type: abstract expressionist painting, gallery-ready
Primary request: bold color collision with flowing brushstrokes, non-representational composition full of emotion and energy
Scene/backdrop: clean gallery wall context, minimal framing
Subject: purely abstract forms, gestural marks, energetic color fields without recognizable imagery
Style/medium: abstract expressionism, acrylic on canvas, gestural painting
Composition/framing: large-scale canvas format, dynamic asymmetrical balance
Lighting/mood: dramatic gallery lighting highlighting texture and impasto, contemplative and intense atmosphere
Color palette: vibrant clashing primaries, saturated oranges against deep blues, hot reds meeting cool greens, high chroma contrast
Materials/textures: thick impasto, visible brushwork, layered paint drips, canvas weave
Constraints: maintain pure abstraction with no figurative elements, emphasize emotional intensity through color relationships
Avoid: recognizable objects, photorealistic rendering, digital smoothness, pastel tones, literal representation
